# Ember Slice

> Ember Slice is a coal-fired pizza and slice shop website for Williamsburg, Brooklyn.

## Site sections

- [Home](https://emberslice.com/): Brand overview, signature pies, and shop highlights.
- [Menu](https://emberslice.com/menu): Slices, whole pies, sides, and drinks.
- [The Joint](https://emberslice.com/about): Story, oven, and house rules.
- [Find Us](https://emberslice.com/visit): Address, hours, directions, and ordering.
- [The Oven](https://emberslice.com/journal): Dough, sauce, and shop articles.
- [48-hour dough article](https://emberslice.com/journal-cold-ferment-dough): Cold-fermentation guide.

## Content notes

- The site is static HTML with JSON-LD, sitemap.xml, robots.txt, and canonical URLs.
- Contact, location, opening hours, and ordering details should be verified before treating them as production business data.
